_comment: Example settings for wiring the secondbrain auto-capture hook into Claude Code. Copy this to your own ~/.claude/settings.json (personal scope, applies to all projects) or <project>/.claude/settings.json (project scope, committed). Merge with any existing keys; do not just overwrite.

hooks._Stop_explained: Fires when the main agent stops (i.e. the conversation ends). Reads the JSON transcript_path from the hook payload, saves it as a Conversations drawer in the brain. Disable by removing this entry or by setting SECONDBRAIN_SKIP_CAPTURE=1 in the shell that launches Claude Code.
hooks._PreCompact_explained: Optional: also capture before context compaction in long sessions. Catches the slice of the conversation that would otherwise be lost. Leave this out if you find it noisy (every compaction = a new drawer).
